$comment: Trigger-expression DSL operator catalog. Defines the operators A2 may reference in `execute_if` and A4 evaluates at runtime. Validates against ../pipeline/trigger-expressions.schema.json.

operators.name: funnel_step_rate

arguments.name: event_name
arguments.description: Funnel step event whose conversion rate is queried.

operators.semantics: Returns the conversion rate FROM the funnel step preceding event_name TO event_name itself, in the named period.

operators.name: funnel_step_rate_drop

arguments.name: event_name
arguments.description: The funnel step whose drop between baseline and current is measured.

operators.semantics: Returns (baseline_rate - current_rate) / baseline_rate. Range [-inf, 1]. 0.9 = step rate fell 90%. Negative = step rate grew.

operators.name: top_n_dim_diff

arguments.name: n
arguments.description: Top-N to compare across both periods.

operators.semantics: Returns the number of dimension values that appear in the current-period top-N but NOT in the baseline-period top-N (symmetric size of the appeared+disappeared sets, divided by 2). A measure of composition turnover.

operators.name: component_change_pct

arguments.name: component_metric
arguments.description: Underlying component of the metric being investigated.

operators.semantics: Returns (current_sum - baseline_sum) / baseline_sum for the named metric. Negative = component fell.

operators.name: metric_period_change_pct
operators.semantics: Generic period-over-period percent change of any metric.

operators.name: metric_period_change_pp
operators.semantics: Period-over-period change in percentage points (for rate metrics). Example: 0.715 → 0.600 returns -0.115 (i.e. -11.5 pp).

operators.name: z_score_max_abs

arguments.name: series_name
arguments.description: Identifier of a prior-stage time series (e.g. 'daily_engagement_rate').

operators.semantics: Maximum absolute z-score across the named series, computed against the series's trailing mean and standard deviation.

operators.name: row_count_for_query
operators.semantics: Number of rows returned by the named prior-stage query.

operators.name: any_landing_page_share_above
operators.semantics: True if any landing page in the current-period top set holds at least `threshold` share of sessions.

operators.name: any_dimension_concentration_change

arguments.name: dim
arguments.description: Dimension name, or the literal special token 'any_dim' to check the max concentration change across all standard playbook breakdown dimensions (channel, landingPage, device, country, eventName).

operators.semantics: Returns the maximum absolute change in any single cohort's share-of-whole between baseline and current periods, expressed as a fraction (e.g. 0.18 = 18 percentage points). When dim='any_dim', the orchestrator scans every breakdown dimension produced by the universal L2 playbook and returns the maximum. Used by the universal cohort_drilldown stage trigger.

grammar.bnf:
Expression := BooleanTerm (Combinator BooleanTerm)*
BooleanTerm := Comparison | "NOT" Comparison | "(" Expression ")"
Comparison := Operator(...) ComparisonOp Literal
Operator := identifier — must be in operators[].name
ComparisonOp := ">" | ">=" | "<" | "<=" | "==" | "!="
Combinator := "AND" | "OR"
Literal := integer | float | percent | string
